name: Rocket Arrow Express
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>爆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>走</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>特</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>急</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ロケット・アロー
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by controlling no cards, and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you Special Summon this card. You cannot activate cards or effects, or Set any cards. During each of your Standby Phases, destroy this card unless you send your entire hand to the Graveyard (min.1).
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by controlling no cards, and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you Special Summon this card. You cannot activate cards or effects, or Set any cards. During each of your Standby Phases, destroy this card unless you send your entire hand to the Graveyard (min.1).
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by controlling no cards, and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. You cannot conduct your Battle Phase the turn you Special Summon this card. You cannot activate cards or effects, or Set any cards. During each of your Standby Phases, destroy this card unless you send your entire hand to the Graveyard (min.1).

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Condition, Continuous, Maintenance cost
action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
